title: Cobblemon Nebula GUI
description: A resource pack that overhauls Cobblemon's UI
body:
**(NOTICE)** The original was created by FabuNova, I'm continuing it with permission.

![Permission Proof](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15442e4696b2a2ea95af6de54ac3bcc201199917.png)

Nebula GUI is an overhaul of the Cobblemon UI, as well as compatibility with certain other mods.

Features:

- Updated to work with 1.21.1 Cobblemon 1.6
- Double Battle support, triple untested but should work
- Cobblemon Rize Tweaks compatibility
- Cobblemon UI Tweaks partial compatibility
- Party List (100% Finished)
- Battle GUI (100% Finished)
- Summary (100% Finished)
- PC GUI (100% Finished)
- Type & Category Icons (60%, all type icons are done, just not the smaller type icons)

Missing/Planned Features

- Starter Selection GUI
- Pokemon Interaction GUI
- Mega Showdown support (may automatically work with certain other mega mods, unsure, since the buttons are in cobblemon itself)
